Community: LHP Data Operations; LHP Glossary Stewards
Notes: The single Data Steward: connects sources, profiles, runs identification; stewards Patient, Appointments & Encounters and Clinic Operations terms
HIM lead; stewards Diagnoses & Results and Prescriptions terms incl. Diagnosis Code and DEA Schedule
Stewards Claims & Billing and Payers terms incl. Claim Number; owns the revenue-cycle story
Privacy Officer; stewards Privacy & Disclosures (all CDE) and Records & Documents terms
Storage & custodian persona: creates/ingests data sources (the bulk loader needs this role), monitors storage utilization; the app's Govern custodian slot maps from this role
Data Developer persona: authors the Workshop 4 business rules and metadata/domain rules (in PDC v11 this role owns Business Rules; note the Admin role cannot create them)
Data User persona: reads metadata, searches, views dashboards and data assets for their line of business - cannot edit the glossary or connect sources
Business User persona (lightest tier): views the business glossary and policies only - no data-source access; the contrast case to Jamal (Data User)
Creates users, defines custom properties, manages workers and licence (in the lab, catalog.admin carries all seven roles)
